NFT Gallery

Add NFTs by pasting OpenSea URLs

Add New NFT

When you list an NFT on OpenSea, paste the URL here:

Works with OpenSea, Rarible, Blur URLs. The page will remember your NFTs.

No NFTs added yet. Paste an OpenSea URL above.

How This Works

  1. List NFT on OpenSea/Rarible/Blur
  2. Copy the marketplace URL
  3. Paste it in the form above
  4. NFT appears here with buy link

For other users: They send you their marketplace URL, you paste it here.
